## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if applicable.

## Additional context

Logs, configuration (redact secrets), or anything else that helps diagnose the issue.
